title: EXPRESSION OF INTEREST: For Provision and Supply of Various Goods & Services for 2026
description: TGNP invites applications from credible service providers for supply of goods and services including: printing/publishing, office stationery, IT equipment, catering, hotel services, photography/videography, event management, IT services, internet/antivirus, repair and maintenance, and more for Financial Year 2026-2027.
eligibility: Credible, eligible, and well-established service providers
